## Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated for the new behaviour
- [ ] `plugin.json.version` + csproj `<Version>` bumped if behaviour changed
- [ ] Plugin README updated if configuration surface or endpoints changed
- [ ] No AI / bot attribution in commit messages
